name: Reynold
archetype: Level 12 Paladin, devoted knight-errant with unwavering honor
speech_patterns: Uses formal address and titles when speaking to others
Speaks in complete sentences with proper grammar
Frequently references codes of honor and duty
quirks: Bows or salutes before entering dungeons
Refuses to loot before ensuring all party members are safe
example_phrases: I shall stand as your shield, good companions.
Honor demands we aid those in peril, regardless of reward.
By my oath, this dungeon shall not claim us this day.
A true knight never abandons their post, even in the face of overwhelming odds.
Let us proceed with valor and vigilance, friends.
